description:
Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). 

Upper piece: The names of the parties are deliberately erased. Mentions a sum of slightly over 47 dinars. Also mentions "[...] the West this year," probably referring to intended business travel.

Lower piece: The one name preserved on this fragment has likewise been thoroughly rubbed out. Dated: 1436 Seleucid, which is 1124/25 CE.

Probable join: Oded Zinger.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
